args: release.yml 'Publish help tree to shll.ai' step never lands help/run-kit.json in sahil87/shll.ai. Root cause from v2.1.8 release run (26816371162): cp help/run-kit.json /tmp/shll-ai/help/run-kit.json fails (No such file or directory — destination help/ dir not guaranteed in the clone), the cp failure is not guarded with || return 1, set -e is neutralized because publish_to_shllai runs in an if-condition, and the 'unchanged since last release — nothing to publish' guard then returns 0 — masking the failure as a false success. Fix: mkdir -p the destination dir before cp, hard-fail on cp error, and distinguish copy-failure from genuine no-diff so the publish can't silently no-op.
